---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change or new capability
title: "[Feature]"
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What limitation does this proposal try to solve?

## Proposal

Describe the desired change clearly and concisely.

## Affected draft or area

- Drafts involved:
- Runtime behavior or fixture-only data:
- Module or tool affected:

## Validation and compatibility

- What should be tested?
- Could this affect URI or reference resolution?
- Could this affect translation?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Alternatives considered

List alternatives, if any.

## Risks

Call out compatibility, cost, and test impact.
